subject: Projects 15,000 to 45,000 sq.ft.
body:
Jeffery,
 
Attached is a quick slide show of projects that I have completed.  The  scale 
of the projects range from 15,000 sq.ft to 45,000 sq.ft. I have also been  
involved with the construction of my projects as a hands on Architect.  I  have 
a complete understanding of the complex construction and coordination  of 
large residences. 
 
Thank you for your consideration and please call me to discuss.
 
Gary Savitzky, Architect



**************Biggest Grammy Award surprises of all time on AOL Music.
